step_rationale: Cell-free DNA released during cardiomyocyte necrosis; AMI severity marker.
mechanism: Cell-free DNA released from necrotic myocardium, reflecting infarct size and severity in acute myocardial infarction.

references.title: Fluid-based assays and precision medicine of cardiovascular diseases: the 'hope' for Pandora's box?
Cell-free nucleic acids as a non-invasive route for investigating atherosclerosis.
